DBSCAN expansion for TRACLUS line segment clustering

Source: R/dbscan.R
dot-dbscan_expand.Rd

Implements the modified DBSCAN algorithm from Paper Figure 12. Core logic: segments with >= min_lns neighbours are "core segments" that seed cluster expansion. The key modification from standard DBSCAN is that noise segments CAN be reassigned to a cluster, but they do NOT trigger further expansion (Paper Figure 12, Lines 23-26).

Usage

.dbscan_expand(neighbours, min_lns)

Arguments

neighbours

List of integer vectors (1-indexed adjacency lists from C++ neighbourhood computation).

min_lns

Minimum neighbourhood size for core segments (integer >= 1).

Value

Integer vector of cluster assignments. 0 = unclassified (will become NA noise). Cluster IDs are 1-indexed and sequential.

On this page
